_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The analyst's higher trust weight and distribution read carry the lean—momentum exhaustion against macro headwinds favors a drift down one rung to Complacency before any bottom is confirmed.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls DOWN to Complacency (distribution exhaustion), narrative implies UP toward Disbelief (relief rally once fear clears); the split is resolved by leaning to the higher-trust analyst voice.
